headlines.title: No deal announced after Trump meeting to make 'final determination' on Iran
headlines.summary: The US president met his advisers after officials confirmed the US and Iran had agreed a framework of a deal to extend the ceasefire and launch nuclear negotiations.

headlines.title: US not 'turning back' on Asia allies, but expects them to boost defence - Hegseth
headlines.summary: The US defense secretary addressed questions about US commitment, including further arms deals, at an Asian security summit in Singapore.

headlines.title: Ghana's parliament passes anti-LGBTQ+ bill
headlines.summary: Same-sex acts are punishable by jail terms under Ghana's new bill targeting those identifying as gay, lesbian or transgender.

headlines.title: Spain's Sánchez digs in after eight years as PM as wave of scandals threatens survival
headlines.summary: Corruption probes of colleagues and relatives have put Spain's premier into a fight for survival.

headlines.title: NATO and EU condemn Russia after drone hits Romanian residential block
headlines.summary: Romania says the Russian drone was likely hit over Ukraine by its air defences and altered its trajectory, injuring two people.

headlines.title: Four more men freed from flooded Laos cave after 10 days
headlines.summary: Two of the seven villagers who entered the narrow tunnels in search for gold on 20 May are still missing.

headlines.title: Israel put on UN sexual violence in warzones blacklist for first time
headlines.summary: Israel rejects allegations in a new UN report; Russia also added to the blacklist.

headlines.title: Trump ponders whether to move forward with Iran deal but hasn't yet decided
headlines.summary: US and Iranian negotiators reached a tentative 60-day memorandum of understanding to extend the ceasefire, pending Trump's final approval.

headlines.title: Israeli soldiers share rare accounts from Gaza, describing ongoing killings despite the ceasefire
headlines.summary: Accounts from soldiers stationed in Gaza amid a fragile ceasefire offer a rare glimpse into the Israeli-controlled part of the territory.

headlines.title: Romania says Russian drone hit apartment block, NATO vows to defend alliance territory
headlines.summary: A Russian drone crashed into an apartment block in the NATO member state during an attack on neighbouring Ukraine.
